visualSamplesReviewed.notes: Tenant-admin billing dashboard renders compact plan strip, invoice list, failed invoice dunning status, and retry action without overlap.
Mobile tenant-admin view keeps status badges, retry action, and invoice cards legible; no text collision or clipping observed.
Business-partner invoicing table remains scannable on desktop with contract, terms, balance, and invoice status visible.
Mobile business-partner view uses the existing wide-table grammar without incoherent overlap; columns remain readable in the captured viewport.
Tenant-user mobile invoice history makes the failed invoice and retry payment action visually dominant, matching the Stripe billing reference.
Platform-admin mobile summary has clear state counts and action links without clipping.

commands.name: focused visual verification
commands.command: $env:VITE_PORT='5176'; Push-Location client; npx playwright test e2e/subscription-billing.spec.ts -g "R-07|R-08|P1-04" --reporter=line; Pop-Location
